repo_notes.content: env-ee-nit is an adaptor between kubernetes manifests and the tool envee

pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: High-level introduction to env-ee-nit: what it does, why it exists, its relationship to the envee project, and a map to all child pages.

pages.title: Getting Started
pages.purpose: Step-by-step guide for setting up the development environment, building the binary, and running the tool for the first time — covering prerequisites, mise.toml toolchain, justfile recipes, and CLI flags.

pages.title: Core Concepts and Terminology
pages.purpose: Explains the key domain concepts: environments, versions, the versions.toml file, the refresh cycle, and the relationship to the envee companion project.

pages.title: Application Architecture
pages.purpose: Overview of how the Go source files are organized and how they interact, linking to child pages for each major subsystem.

pages.title: CLI Entrypoint and Execution Pipeline
pages.purpose: Detailed walkthrough of main.go: CLI flag parsing, client selection logic, the five-phase execution pipeline (load → refresh → fetch → sort → save), and error handling.

pages.title: Configuration Management
pages.purpose: Deep dive into config.go: the Config and Version structs, TOML serialization via BurntSushi/toml, LoadConfig and SaveConfig functions, and the versions.toml file schema.

pages.title: Kubernetes Integration
pages.purpose: Covers k8s.go in depth: GetK8sClient (live cluster via kubeconfig), GetK8sFilesClient (fake clientset from local YAML), FetchVersionsFromNamespace, and the parseImage string-parsing logic.

pages.title: Refresh and Sort Logic
pages.purpose: Explains refresh.go: the RunRefresh clear-and-replace pattern, environment validation, SortVersions with primary/secondary sort keys, and environment priority mapping.

pages.title: Testing
pages.purpose: Overview of the test strategy, linking to child pages covering unit tests and golden-file integration tests.

pages.title: Unit Tests
pages.purpose: Documents config_test.go (TestAddEnvIfMissing, TestSaveAndLoad) and k8s_test.go (TestParseImage, TestFetchVersions with fake clientset), covering test patterns and assertions.

pages.title: Golden File Integration Tests
pages.purpose: Explains the golden-file testing approach using testdata/: how TestFetchVersionsFromGoldenFiles works, the structure of app-a.yaml and app-foo-a.yaml, and how to add new test fixtures.

pages.title: CI/CD and Release Pipeline
pages.purpose: Overview of the GitHub Actions workflows and automated dependency management, linking to child pages for each pipeline.

pages.title: Continuous Integration Workflow
pages.purpose: Documents .github/workflows/go.yml: triggers (push/PR to main), the build job, Go version pinning, go build and go test steps, and the ubuntu-latest runner environment.

pages.title: SLSA Level 3 Release Pipeline
pages.purpose: Documents the supply-chain security release workflow: SLSA provenance generation, the args/build job split, ldflags injection, OIDC token signing, and the .slsa-goreleaser.yml build configuration.

pages.title: Dependency Automation
pages.purpose: Covers .github/dependabot.yml configuration for weekly automated Go module updates, and the go.mod/go.sum dependency manifest structure.

pages.title: Glossary
pages.purpose: Definitions of all codebase-specific terms, abbreviations, and domain concepts that an onboarding engineer needs to know, with code pointers.
